bullets: Target: health-conscious women in their 50s with strong purchasing power
Position matcha as a daily wellness ritual with premium quality
Multi-channel approach combining TV and digital touchpoints
Women 50+ value quality, authenticity, and wellness benefits

Growing interest in Japanese tea culture and mindfulness trends
A serene 30-second spot: a sophisticated woman enjoying a calm morning moment
Warm lighting, Japanese aesthetics, quality-of-life framing
Elegant packaging shots and craftsmanship storytelling to justify premium pricing
Prime-time and morning information programs index well against F50 viewers
Launch timing aligned with new-year health resolutions or spring wellness season
